name: Constance leather handbag
description:
Preowned in excellent condition.

There is little-to-no visible wear, with protective plastic intact on the hardware.
The Constance 18 Mini is one of Hermès’ most sought-after silhouettes, defined by its clean lines and signature “H” clasp. Crafted from Evercolor leather in Bleu Zanzibar, the structured exterior maintains a crisp, architectural form while offering durability and resistance to scratches. The deep blue tone is complemented by polished gold-tone hardware, creating a refined contrast.

The design features a double-gusset interior, opening to two main compartments with additional slip pockets for organized storage. The adjustable leather strap allows for both crossbody wear and a shorter shoulder carry when doubled. This example is marked with a Z stamp, indicating 2021 production, and retains its full set with protective elements intact.

Please check images for details.
Full set included.

Length: 18 cm / 7.09 in
Height: 15 cm / 5.91 in
Depth: 4 cm / 1.57 in
